widgetData.text: <|cls|> This Credit Agreement is made and entered into as of [DATE], by and between [BORROWER NAME], a Delaware corporation with its principal place of business at [ADDRESS] (the "<|mask|>"), and [LENDER NAME], a national banking association (the "Lender"). <|sep|>

widgetData.example: <|cls|> Form 10-<|mask|> is a report filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission used by public companies to disclose financial results on a quarterly basis. It is submitted within 45 days of the end of each of the first three fiscal quarters of the company's fiscal year. <|sep|>
